title: Initial project mindmap creation
summary: Deep analysis of the entire OEPS project structure. Created comprehensive mindmap with 44 nodes, 61 edges, and 9 groups covering all backend modules (FastAPI, SQLAlchemy models, API routes, schemas), frontend screens (Login, Dashboard, Exam, Result), services (API client, Proctor, Utils), CSS design system, infrastructure (Docker, Nginx), and cross-cutting flows (Auth, Exam Lifecycle, Proctoring).
